assertionResults.title: Multi-device sign failure drives SigningFailedModal with real data

steps.action: Seeded paired runtimes via DEV hooks (tab A share[1], tab B share[2]), dispatched sign from tab A with tab B non-responding
steps.expected: SigningFailedModal opens from real OperationFailure with round id, peer-response line, and error; no hard-coded placeholders
steps.observed: Modal opened with failure request_id 978a4a3e57f85eaeee9b884d0550c957; text rendered Round r-978a4a3e, Code timeout, Error locked peer response timeout, Peer responses: not reported by runtime; placeholders r-0x4f2a / 1/2 / insufficient partial signatures were absent

assertionResults.title: Retry in SigningFailedModal re-dispatches the sign

steps.action: Clicked Retry on the opened SigningFailedModal
steps.expected: Retry dispatches sign with same message_hex_32, creates fresh request_id/pending sign, and closes stale modal
steps.observed: Modal closed; old failure request_id remained 978a4a3e57f85eaeee9b884d0550c957; new sign request_id 0a5bdfa924f50d5707d59e7bbbb33991 appeared in pending_operations and pendingDispatchIndex with the same message_hex_32

assertionResults.title: Non-sign failures do NOT open the SigningFailedModal

steps.action: Observed runtime ping timeout failures after retry flow
steps.expected: Non-sign failures surface as non-modal feedback and do not mount SigningFailedModal
steps.observed: runtimeFailures contained ping timeout entries (op_type=ping); SigningFailedModal remained unmounted; non-sign failure banner stack rendered visible ping failure notices

steps.action: Paused signer from dashboard (Stop Signer / Start Signer state) and inspected dev controls
steps.expected: signerPaused=true blocks sign/ECDH/ping dispatch from dev surface
steps.observed: Paused UI showed Start Signer with Test Sign/Test ECDH/Ping disabled; paused dispatch attempts for sign/ecdh/ping returned requestId null with zero pending delta and zero sign pending entries

steps.action: Resumed signer and dispatched Test Sign
steps.observed: After resume signerPaused=false; Test Sign produced request_id d54949c1cb18f0bfc04094f7b032f608 and a fresh pending Sign operation

frictions.description: Single-tab seeded runtime did not produce sign request_id (requestId null with only Ping pending entries), preventing direct failure/retry validation.
frictions.resolution: Used DEV hooks to seed a paired second tab in the same isolated session with a shared keyset bundle; assertions were then validated from tab A.

frictions.description: agent-browser network capture returned 'No requests captured' for this surface.
frictions.resolution: Captured app-state observables (runtimeFailures, pendingDispatchIndex, pending_operations) and screenshots as primary evidence.
